description: Central, editable configuration for the Lumirise operations flow. Replaces hard-coded warehouse / company / UOM values in code so everything is dynamic and site-configurable.

fields.description: Default company for documents the engine creates. Falls back to the system default company if left blank.
fields.label: Default Company

fields.description: Staging area the RM kit is issued into before it is split to the lines (RM Store → Shop Floor).
fields.label: Shop Floor

fields.description: Where finished goods are first received from the line (Manufacture target). Distinct from the Dispatch FG store.
fields.label: Production FG Store

fields.description: Dispatch-ready FG store. Goods move here from Production FG before Customer PDI / Delivery Note.
fields.label: Dispatch FG Store

fields.description: Fallback line WIP when a Work Order has no per-line allocation. Per-line warehouses below are preferred.
fields.label: Default Line WIP

fields.description: Quarantine store samples are drawn into for Customer PDI (FG ↔ PDI swap).
fields.label: Customer PDI Store

fields.description: Sample-custody warehouse the IQC lab holds pre-GRN inbound samples in (10.1). The sample is logged pre-GRN, moved here RM Store → IQC Lab once the GRN posts, then dispositioned back to RM / Production FG / scrap.
fields.label: IQC Lab Store

fields.description: Inbound staging warehouse goods land in before put-away. Optional.
fields.label: Receiving / Staging

fields.description: Each physical assembly line is its own warehouse so per-line stock is visible. Material is transferred Shop Floor → a chosen line, and RM is consumed from that line.
fields.label: Production Lines

fields.description: Auto-create a pick task when a Pick List is generated.
fields.label: Pick task on Pick List

fields.description: Auto-create a put-away task when a GRN is posted.
fields.label: Put-away task on GRN

fields.description: Settings for the daily self-test (lumirise_custom.health_check).
fields.label: Daily Health Check

fields.description: DANGER: when on (and this is NOT the production site), the daily run also drives a real synthetic order-to-cash + costing chain that creates and deletes test documents. Leave OFF on production.
fields.label: Run destructive synthetic tests (test site only)

fields.description: The bench site name of PRODUCTION (e.g. lumiriseindia.m.frappe.cloud). The synthetic tier is skipped whenever the running site matches this, even if the flag above is on.
fields.label: Production Site Name (synthetic kill-switch)

fields.description: When on, only Red runs notify (suppresses the green/amber daily heartbeat).
fields.label: Notify only on Red

fields.description: Comma/newline-separated user emails to receive the in-ERP digest. Blank = all enabled System Managers.
fields.label: Digest Recipients

fields.description: Warn if Error Log entries in the last 24h reach this count.
fields.label: Error Log spike threshold (24h)

fields.description: Warn if Stock Settings over-delivery/receipt allowance exceeds this percentage.
fields.label: Over-receipt allowance cap (%)

fields.description: Expected Server Script count. Drift from this warns. 0 = not checked.
fields.label: Baseline: Server Scripts

fields.description: Expected Client Script count. Drift from this warns. 0 = not checked.
fields.label: Baseline: Client Scripts

fields.description: Expected Lumirise Custom field count. Drift from this warns. 0 = not checked.
fields.label: Baseline: Custom Fields

fields.description: Flag a Sales Order line as a PO-match exception when its rate differs from the source Quotation by more than this percentage.
fields.label: PO/Quotation rate tolerance (%)

fields.description: Days rejected RM may sit in the rejection warehouse before the daily hold-timer raises a scrap-review task. Default 30.
fields.label: RM Rejection Hold Days

fields.description: When ON, a GRN cannot submit until Purchase releases the PO's Inbound Logistics container. OFF (default) = warn + a Purchase task only.
fields.label: Block GRN without container release

name: Lumirise Operations Settings
